name: SoFi Technologies
thesis: SoFi Technologies fits the next-generation consumer finance platforms sleeve at $18.93; the 10x case depends on years of compounding rather than a quick rerating. If the platform becomes a primary financial account for younger customers and cross-sell expands, revenue per user could compound for years from a still-modest base. Moat evidence to verify: Brand, product velocity, embedded distribution, and data-driven underwriting are the execution signals to monitor. Alt alpha: Neutral pulse from 6 recent headline(s).
